# History & Politics — 1987

World events, Cold War developments, treaties, and political turning points of 1987.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: category-index:history-politics — maintained by build-structure; do not edit by hand -->
| Topic | Description |
|---|---|
| [Montreal Protocol (September 16, 1987)](montreal-protocol.md) | 46 nations adopt the first global environmental treaty, setting binding schedules to phase out ozone-depleting CFCs and halons. |
| [INF Treaty (December 8, 1987)](inf-treaty.md) | Reagan and Gorbachev sign the Intermediate-Range Nuclear Forces Treaty, the first arms-control accord to eliminate an entire class of nuclear weapons. |
<!-- END GENERATED: category-index:history-politics -->
